get.description: Fetches a paginated list of Teams resources with metadata including total count, current page, and pagination links.

parameters.description: Sort fields with direction: field1,-field2 (- for DESC)
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Fetches a single Teams resource by its unique identifier(s). Returns the complete resource data.

put.description: Updates an existing Teams by its unique identifier(s). Only provided fields will be updated (partial update).

400.description: Invalid input data or validation error

delete.description: Permanently deletes a Teams by its unique identifier(s). This action cannot be undone.

409.description: Cannot delete: referenced by other records
